calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-30-2007 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, Clerk Carla Amador, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Patricia Moe is present in pro per.

Defendant Timothy M. Brown is present.
Chales Huse representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located at 2076 10th Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94116.

This case settled, the trial date of September 4, 2007 is vacated.
